The offices of the Salt Guild occupied a granite hall above the fish market of Port Saffron. Mira Vale waited on a bench while Elias Thorn argued with a clerk about the impounded cargo. Mira Vale had known Elias Thorn for eleven years, since the winter the Heron lost her mast off the shoals, and she could tell from the set of his shoulders that the argument was going badly. When Elias Thorn finally came out, he said only one word: "Confiscated." Mira Vale looked back at the granite hall and began, quietly, to plan.
